name: Tempting Trifle Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the soft coconut macaroon cookie crumbs by using 1 1/2 cups of softened coconut macaroons and finely crushing them.
2. In a large bowl, beat together the sugar, cream cheese, eggs, whipping cream, sweet sherry, and vanilla until smooth.
3. Stir in the red raspberry preserves and whipped cream until well combined.
4. Fold in the toasted slivered almonds.
5. Pour the mixture into a greased baking dish or springform pan.
6. Refrigerate for at least 2 hours before serving to allow the filling to set properly.
7. Serve chilled, garnished with additional toasted slivered almonds if desired.
